revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:隼神社 (京都市)]] {{Expand Japanese|隼神社 (京都市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hayabusa Shrine (Q135021848) | native_name = 隼神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hayabusa Shrine (Q135021848) | coordinates = {{coord|35.006045|135.744362}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hayabusa Shrine'''|隼神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[the Imperial Palace]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135009132|ltq=Q135009132|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|lt=List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|ja|宮中・京中の式内社一覧|simple|List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace|qid=Q11453224|1=List of Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace}} ** Series ordinal: 15 ** P155: {{ill|Q135021846|ltq=Q135021846|qid=Q135021846|1=Kushimachinomikotono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q65278999|ltq=Q65278999|qid=Q65278999|1=Hazukashi Shrine}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.006045|135.744362}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041121152817/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=1901 == replaced by (P1366) == * {{ill|Q11538723|ltq=Q11538723|qid=Q11538723|1=Nagi Shrine (Kyoto)}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180569 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} [[JA:隼神社 (京都市)]] {{wikidata link|Q135021848}} == Hayabusa Shrine == {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Hayabusa Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Nagi-jinja Hayabusa-jinja.JPG|250px]]
Hayabusa Shrine | location = | coordinates = | Enshrined Deities = {{ill|Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|ja|建甕槌神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} | Alternate name = | festival = November 17 | Rituals = }} '''Hayabusa Shrine''' (隼神社) is located within the Nagi Shrine grounds and is an ancient {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. [[File:隼神社.jpg|thumb|200px|right|Hayabusa Shrine stone pillar]] === Enshrined Deities === ; Main deity * {{ill|Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|ja|建甕槌神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ; Additional deity * {{ill|Futsunushi|en|Futsunushi|qid=Q1107286|qid=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi|1=Futsunushi}} === History === The exact origins of the shrine are unknown, but it is mentioned in the {{ill|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|en|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|qid=Q1052981|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}} (860–874) as "After-In Hayabusa Shrine," ascending to the Rank of {{ill|Jūshi-i Jō|ja|従四位上|1=Junior Fourth Rank|lt=Junior Fourth Rank, Upper Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūshi-i Jō|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従四位}}.{{Harvid|隼社（平凡社）|1979th year }} It is listed as a major shrine in the {{ill|Engishiki|en|Engishiki|qid=Q1342448|lt=Engishiki|1=Engishiki}} (927), where it received offerings during the {{ill|Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|ja|月次祭|1=Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukinami-no-Matsuri|qq=}} and {{ill|Niiname-no-Matsuri|en|Niiname-no-Matsuri|qid=Q11501518|lt=Niinamesai|1=Niiname-no-Matsuri}}.{{Harvid|隼社（平凡社）|1979th year }} Originally located in the Suzaku-in area, it was later moved to its current location in the Nagi Shrine grounds in 1918.The shrine explanation panel states 1918, while other sources mention 1920. == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hayabusa Shrine (Q135021848)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hayabusa Shrine (Q135021848)]][[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto]] [[Category:History of Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in the Imperial Palace]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Nakagyo-ku, Kyoto]] [[Category:壬生 (京都市)]]
